name: Danton
description: No one else made this guy, so now I take credit. Anyways, Danton is a construction worker that is typically seen fixing things through out Antonblast five minutes before you put him into a hospital again. I'm not sure entirely, but Danton might be having something going on with Nina, although, this also coming from the guy who's probably insane.
creator: Live_Yharim_Reaction
